subject: session date
fact: The session date is recorded as April 12th, 2026.
source_quote: Date: Apr 12th, 2026

subject: corridor length
fact: The corridor leading to the vault door is fifty feet long.
source_quote: fifty-foot corridor

subject: trap mechanism
fact: The traps in the corridor are laid upon tiles corresponding to prime numbers.
source_quote: traps were laid upon tiles corresponding to prime numbers

subject: vault temperature
fact: The vault chamber is kept at a constant 55 degrees Fahrenheit.
source_quote: constant 55 degrees Fahrenheit

subject: transaction ID
fact: Felkur's past sale is recorded as Transaction 44781 in the Lexicon of Oaths.
source_quote: Transaction 44781

subject: blood alcohol content
fact: Felkur's blood alcohol content was noted at 0.18% during the sale.
source_quote: blood alcohol content noted at a remarkable 0.18%

subject: sale price
fact: The priceless brooch was sold for the sum of forty-five gold pieces.
source_quote: forty-five gold pieces

subject: sale price summary
fact: Felkur sold a priceless artifact for 45 gold pieces.
source_quote: sold a priceless artifact for 45 gold

subject: loophole condition
fact: The contract with Maram il Vass is null and void if the Lexicon no longer contains the information needed to identify Felkur.
source_quote: if the Lexicon no longer contained the information needed to identify him, the contract was null and void

subject: recalibration time
fact: Felkur needs a few more precious minutes to finish his work on the portal.
source_quote: Felkur needed only a few more precious minutes to finish his work

subject: chamber diameter
fact: The chamber at the peak of the spire has a diameter of 60 feet.
source_quote: 60-foot diameter chamber

subject: recalibration duration
fact: The recalibration of the teleportation circle requires multiple arcane successes over ten rounds.
source_quote: multiple arcane successes over ten rounds

subject: combat phase
fact: Felkur successfully navigates the second phase of the recalibration.
source_quote: successfully navigating the second phase of the recalibration

subject: session end time
fact: The session ends on round 4 of the combat.
source_quote: The session ends mid-combat on round 4

subject: remaining combat time
fact: There are 6 more rounds remaining before the portal collapses.
source_quote: with 6 more rounds remaining before the portal collapses

subject: glyph corridor length
fact: The Glyph Corridor is a hallway 50 feet long.
source_quote: A 50-foot long hallway

subject: vault dimensions
fact: The Vault of the Spire is a chamber measuring 30 feet by 30 feet.
source_quote: A 30-foot by 30-foot chamber

subject: vault temperature
fact: The Vault of the Spire is kept at a constant temperature of 55 degrees Fahrenheit.
source_quote: kept at a constant 55 degrees Fahrenheit

subject: peak chamber diameter
fact: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning Peak is a chamber 60 feet in diameter.
source_quote: A 60-foot diameter chamber

subject: brooch sale price
fact: Felkur sold the Priceless Brooch to Limping Oric for 45 gold pieces.
source_quote: sold it to Limping Oric for 45 gold pieces

fact: The explosive glyphs of warding are placed on prime-numbered floor tiles.
